use_cases: Showcase product features with icons on landing pages for SaaS platforms
Display AI model ecosystem capabilities with visual illustrations
Present developer tools features in a grid layout for software documentation
Highlight service benefits with iconography and descriptive text
Feature integration options like git sync and AI agents in a modern interface
ai_summary: A feature showcase section component displaying product capabilities in a responsive grid layout. Includes a hero heading, descriptive text, and four feature cards with icons (Zap, Cpu, Lock, Sparkles) highlighting attributes like speed, power, security, and innovation. Features dark/light mode support with gradient overlays and large illustration imagery for visual appeal. Designed for landing pages and product documentation in SaaS, fintech, and developer tool contexts.
